title: Desmos chryseus
taxonomy: Desmos chryseus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Desmodieae. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae, which is a part of the larger family Fabaceae. This classification places Desmos chryseus within the legume family, which includes a wide range of plants known for their seed pods and nitrogen-fixing abilities. The Desmodieae tribe, to which Desmos chryseus belongs, is characterized by its woody climbing habit and compound leaves. As part of the Fabaceae family, Desmos chryseus shares characteristics with other legumes that have similar growth habits and floral structures.
